text.title: design-critique Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for design-critique as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: No stated design goals before critique begins.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feedback without criteria defaults to taste; the session degrades into preference-based debate with no resolution mechanism.

failure-mode.description: Solutioning instead of critiquing — redesigning the product in the meeting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The critique session is for analysis and feedback, not real-time redesign; solutioning prevents the designer from incorporating multiple feedback sources into their own solution.

failure-mode.description: Presenter defending every point instead of listening.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defensive presenter blocks feedback reception; thanking participants for honest feedback is the appropriate response during the session.
